title: Bugcrowd policy changes to address “AI slop” submissions

Bugcrowd policy changes to address “AI slop” submissions
March 10, 2026 | By
Trey Ford
Back to blog
At Bugcrowd, our mission has always been to combine human ingenuity with scalable technology to surface the vulnerabilities that matter most. While AI can accelerate discovery, human operators are ultimately accountable for the quality of each submission for two primary reasons: Professionalism and secure outcomes. Customers demand that the vulnerabilities submitted represent meaning
